calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-05-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Kevin Rooney, Esq. for Plaintiff: A.O. Astorian, Trustee of the Astorian Family Trust.
Plaintiff's Witness: A. Astorian, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Armin Riaz, Azadeh riaz and AAR Enterprises, Inc. as follows:
Damages $50,000.00
Prejudgment Interest $7,958.90
Attorney's Fees $8,320.00
Costs $2,006.73, for a total of $68,285.63
Judgment signed in open court.

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-16-2007 Continued To Jun-05-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
